what: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: R-package accessing Statistikkbank data Statistics Norway (SSB). Statistics Norway (SSB) Norway’s central statistical authority. publishes hundreds official statistics tables Statistikkbank service, covering topics population, economy, labour, housing, health. StatistikkbankR package gives direct R interface Statistikkbank API. can search table catalogue, inspect table structure, download data tidy data.frame tibble objects, directly R. package written using GitHub Copilot Codex Claude.

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: Install development version GitHub:
code: # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("navikt/statistikkbankR")

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: work Nav use VDI Analyse, R may fail verify SSL certificates get error trying install. case, try running command:
code: Sys.setenv(R_LIBCURL_SSL_REVOKE_BEST_EFFORT = "TRUE")

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: Use ssb_search() find tables keyword. function returns data frame one row per matching table; id column pass functions. SSB paginates search results; use fetch_all = TRUE want pages . Alternatively, can find tables interest SSB’s website.
code: library(StatistikkbankR)  # Search for tables about population (in Norwegian) results <- ssb_search("befolkning") results[, c("id", "label", "updated")]  # Or search in English ssb_search("population", language = "en") # Retrieve all pages at once all_results <- ssb_search("arbeid", fetch_all = TRUE) nrow(all_results)

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: table identifier, use ssb_describe() see structure downloading . recommended first command run table ’re interested . Use ssb_codes() list valid values can use filters given dimension:
code: desc <- ssb_describe("07459")  # Table-level summary: title, last updated, estimated total rows desc$table  # One row per dimension: id, label, role, number of codes desc$dimensions # All valid codes for the Region dimension ssb_codes("07459", "Region")  # All valid time periods ssb_codes("07459", "Tid")

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: Pass table identifier get_ssb_data() download full table. SSB enforces cell limit large tables; function warn stop estimated row count high.
code: # Download all data (only works for small tables) data <- get_ssb_data("05803") head(data)

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: Pass dimension identifiers named arguments select rows need. argument accepts character vector codes.
code: # Download population for specific regions for the years 2020, 2021 and 2022 pop <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Region = c("0301", "1103"),     Tid    = 2020:2022 ) pop

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: SSB supports set shorthand expressions evaluated server data returned. can use filter values: details possible query expressions, see SSB API documentation.
code: # The three most recent years for all regions pop_recent <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Tid = "top(3)" )

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: default get_ssb_data() returns data wide format: one column per measure code. Use table_format = "long" get long table instead, one row per observation. filtering single code one dimension, dimension collapses constant dropped wide output retained long output default. Pass include_singleton_dims = TRUE table_format = "long" include constant-value columns explicitly:
code: pop_long <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Region = c("0301", "1103"),     Tid    = 2020:2022,     table_format = "long" ) head(pop_long) pop_one_region <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Region                 = "0301",     Tid                    = "top(3)",     table_format           = "long",     include_singleton_dims = TRUE )

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: default, get_ssb_data() converts quarterly time codes zoo::yearqtr monthly time codes zoo::yearmon.
code: # Quarterly table (12452): Tid becomes yearqtr by default q_dat <- get_ssb_data(     "12452",     Tid = "top(4)",     character_as_factor = FALSE ) class(q_dat$Tid_label)  # Disable quarter conversion and keep raw SSB codes like "2024K1" q_raw <- get_ssb_data(     "12452",     Tid = "top(4)",     character_as_factor = FALSE,     convert_quarter_to_yearqtr = FALSE ) head(q_raw$Tid_label)  # Monthly table (13966): Tid becomes yearmon by default m_dat <- get_ssb_data(     "13966",     Tid = "top(4)",     character_as_factor = FALSE ) class(m_dat$Tid_label)  # Disable month conversion and keep raw SSB codes like "2024M01" m_raw <- get_ssb_data(     "13966",     Tid = "top(4)",     character_as_factor = FALSE,     convert_month_to_yearmon = FALSE ) head(m_raw$Tid_label)

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: SSB provides aggregation codelists let request data different grouping level — example, historical municipality boundaries — without manually remapping individual codes. SSB’s klassR package provides easy interface retrieving SSB classifications, may used alongside package. Use ssb_codelists() discover codelists available: Use ssb_codelist_details() inspect group--member mapping inside specific codelist: Apply codelist downloading data passing codelists output_values arguments get_ssb_data(): use convenience wrapper ssb_get_by_codelist() identifies correct dimension automatically: join aggregated result back individual municipality codes, use ssb_expand_codelist_mapping():
code: ssb_codelists("07459")  # Filter to the geographic dimension ssb_codelists("07459", dimension = "Region") cl <- ssb_codelist_details("agg_KommSummer") cl$codelist   # metadata cl$values     # group codes and their members pop_agg <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Tid           = 2020:2022,     codelists     = list(Region = "agg_KommSummer"),     output_values = list(Region = "aggregated") ) pop_agg <- ssb_get_by_codelist(     "07459",     "agg_KommSummer",     Tid          = 2020:2022,     output_value = "aggregated" ) pop_expanded <- ssb_expand_codelist_mapping(     data        = pop_agg,     code_col    = "Region_code",     codelist_id = "agg_KommSummer" ) head(pop_expanded)

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: default, get_ssb_data() helper functions cache table metadata memory duration R session. Set cache = FALSE disable caching, refresh_metadata = TRUE discard cached copy fetch fresh metadata: details SSB updates tables, see https://www.ssb./en/statbank/.
code: # Force a fresh metadata fetch (e.g. after SSB updates the table) get_ssb_data("07459", Tid = "top(1)", refresh_metadata = TRUE)

title: Access Statistikkbank data from Statistics Norway (SSB)
text: SSB imposes cell limit queries. get_ssb_data() estimates result size sending request stops message query large. proceed anyway, set override_large_query = TRUE:
code: data <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     override_large_query = TRUE )

what: StatistikkbankR: Access Statistikkbank Data from Statistics Norway — StatistikkbankR-package
title: StatistikkbankR: Access Statistikkbank Data from Statistics Norway — StatistikkbankR-package
text: Statistics Norway (SSB) publishes wide range official statistics Statistikkbank API.  package provides simple consistent interface searching table catalogue, inspecting table structure, downloading data directly R tidy data.frame tibble objects. main entry points : ssb_search() Find tables keyword. ssb_describe() Inspect dimensions structure specific table. ssb_codes() List valid filter codes one dimension. get_ssb_data() Download data table, optional filters, codelist aggregation, wide long output. Additional helpers ssb_units, ssb_codelists, ssb_codelist_details, ssb_expand_codelist_mapping, ssb_get_by_codelist support working measurement units geographic aggregation codelists.

title: StatistikkbankR: Access Statistikkbank Data from Statistics Norway — StatistikkbankR-package
text: Maintainer: Tobias Lunde tobias.lunde@nav.

what: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
title: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
text: Downloads one variables SSB Statistikkbank table returns tidy data frame.  Supply table identifier , optionally, filters narrow download rows need. Use ssb_search() find table identifiers ssb_describe() inspect dimensions valid codes table downloading.

title: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
code: get_ssb_data(   table_id,   ...,   language = "no",   as_tibble = TRUE,   override_large_query = FALSE,   table_format = "wide",   include_singleton_dims = FALSE,   include_status = FALSE,   character_as_factor = TRUE,   convert_quarter_to_yearqtr = TRUE,   convert_month_to_yearmon = TRUE,   codelists = NULL,   output_values = NULL,   cache = TRUE,   refresh_metadata = FALSE,   max_get_query_chars = 1500L,   show_chunk_progress = FALSE )

title: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
text: table_id Character.  SSB table identifier, example "07459".  can find identifiers searching https://www.ssb./statbank calling ssb_search(). ... Filters limit rows downloaded.  filter named argument whose name dimension identifier (exactly shown ssb_describe()) whose value character vector codes want.  supply filters entire table downloaded. may also use server-side selection expressions instead listing codes one one: "*" available values dimension. "top(n)" n recent values (useful time dimensions). "bottom(n)" n oldest values. "(code)" values code onwards. "(code)" values including code. "range(, b)" values b. language Character.  language used column value labels result.  Use "" Norwegian (default) "en" English. as_tibble Logical.  TRUE (default), result returned tibble.  Set FALSE get plain data.frame. override_large_query Logical.  SSB limits many data cells single request may return (typically 800,000).  query exceed limit, function stops informative error.  Set override_large_query = TRUE skip check send request anyway.  Use care large tables. table_format Character.  Shape returned data frame. "wide" (default) places measure column. "long" returns one row per value separate dimension, code, label, value columns, convenient plotting ggplot2 tables many measures. include_singleton_dims Logical.  used table_format = "long".  FALSE (default), dimensions one selected value dropped long-format output keep concise.  Set TRUE keep dimensions regardless. include_status Logical.  cells carry status flag "c" (confidential) "." (applicable) instead numeric value.  TRUE, status column added result containing flags.  Defaults FALSE. character_as_factor Logical.  TRUE (default), dimension label columns returned factors, preserves ordering SSB defines codes.  Set FALSE keep plain character strings. convert_quarter_to_yearqtr Logical.  TRUE (default), quarterly time codes "2024K1" converted zoo::yearqtr objects, suitable time series analysis. Set FALSE keep original SSB code strings. convert_month_to_yearmon Logical.  TRUE (default), monthly time codes "2024M01" converted zoo::yearmon objects, suitable time series analysis. Set FALSE keep original SSB code strings. codelists Named list.  Applies SSB aggregation grouping (codelist) one dimensions.  request data aggregated geographic administrative level — example, using summer municipality boundary instead current municipality codes.  name entry must match dimension identifier value must codelist identifier.  Use ssb_codelists() discover codelists available table. Example: list(Region = "agg_KommSummer"). output_values Named list.  codelist groups codes together, argument controls whether result shows aggregated group value ("aggregated", one row per group) individual member codes ("single", one row per member). name must match dimension also appears codelists. Example: list(Region = "aggregated"). cache Logical.  TRUE (default), table metadata (dimension names, valid codes, etc.) stored memory duration R session.  avoids repeated network round-trips call function multiple times table. refresh_metadata Logical.  TRUE, cached metadata table discarded fresh metadata fetched SSB. Useful know table definition changed.  Defaults FALSE. max_get_query_chars Numeric.  Internal tuning parameter.  encoded filter string shorter limit (bytes) request sent standard GET request; longer, sent POST request avoid URL length restrictions.  default value 1500L works vast majority queries rarely needs changed. show_chunk_progress Logical.  Deprecated.  effect removed future version.

title: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
text: tibble (data.frame as_tibble = FALSE) row one observation.  wide format, dimension label columns appear first followed one numeric column per measure.  long format four fixed columns: dimension, code, label, value.  include_status = TRUE additional status column follows value.

title: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
text: Use ssb_search() search table titles keyword ssb_describe() list dimensions specific table together roles number available codes.  know dimension identifiers, call ssb_codes() list exact code strings can used filter values.

title: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
text: Filter arguments matched dimension identifier.  Identifiers case-sensitive must spelled exactly returned ssb_describe().  omit dimension, codes included automatically.  can mix explicit code vectors server-side expressions call.

title: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
text: SSB imposes cell limit request.  function estimates number cells query return sending stops early clear message limit exceeded.  Strategies staying within limit: supply filters reduce number rows, use "top(n)" time dimension, split download several calls different filter values.  query small enough, function sends GET request; larger still-valid queries switches POST request automatically.

title: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
text: SSB publishes aggregation codelists map individual municipality region codes higher-level groupings county historical boundary sets.  Pass codelist identifier codelists use one.  output_values argument controls whether receive aggregated label group ("aggregated") individual member code ("single").  See ssb_codelists() ssb_get_by_codelist() discovery convenience wrappers.

title: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
text: SSB encodes quarters form "YYYYKn" (e.g., "2024K1") months form "YYYYMmm" (e.g., "2024M01"). default, quarterly codes converted zoo::yearqtr monthly codes converted zoo::yearmon. Set convert_quarter_to_yearqtr = FALSE /convert_month_to_yearmon = FALSE keep original SSB code strings.

title: Download data from Statistics Norway (SSB) — get_ssb_data
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # --- 1. Download an entire small table -------------------------------- dat <- get_ssb_data("07459")  # --- 2. Download with filters ----------------------------------------- # Use ssb_describe("07459") and ssb_codes("07459", "Region") # to find valid dimension names and code values first. dat <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Region = c("0301", "1103"),     Tid    = c("2023", "2024") )  # --- 3. Server-side selection expressions ----------------------------- # "top(3)" on Tid keeps only the three most recent years. # "*" on Kjonn selects all available sex categories. dat <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Tid   = "top(3)",     Kjonn = "*" )  # --- 4. Long format for plotting -------------------------------------- dat_long <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Tid        = "top(5)",     table_format = "long" )  # --- 5. English labels ------------------------------------------------ dat_en <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Tid      = "top(3)",     language = "en" )  # --- 6. Codelist: aggregated regions ---------------------------------- # Download population using historical summer municipality boundary. # output_values = "aggregated" returns one row per boundary group. dat_agg <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Tid          = "top(3)",     codelists    = list(Region = "agg_KommSummer"),     output_values = list(Region = "aggregated") )  # --- 7. Status flags -------------------------------------------------- # Keep the status column to see suppressed or missing cells. dat_status <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Tid            = "top(3)",     include_status = TRUE )  # --- 8. Quarterly time values as zoo::yearqtr --------------------------- # Table 12452 has quarterly time codes such as "2024K1". # By default, these are converted to zoo::yearqtr objects. dat_q <- get_ssb_data(     "12452",     Tid = "top(4)" )  # --- 9. Monthly time values as zoo::yearmon --------------------------- # Table 13966 has monthly time codes such as "2024M01". # By default, these are converted to zoo::yearmon objects. # dat_m <- get_ssb_data( #     "13966", #     Tid = "top(4)" # ) } # }

what: Inspect the members of an SSB codelist — ssb_codelist_details
title: Inspect the members of an SSB codelist — ssb_codelist_details
text: Downloads full definition single codelist — group codes defines underlying member codes group contains. Use understand exactly codelist maps individual codes higher-level groups using get_ssb_data().

title: Inspect the members of an SSB codelist — ssb_codelist_details
code: ssb_codelist_details(codelist_id, language = "no", as_tibble = TRUE)

title: Inspect the members of an SSB codelist — ssb_codelist_details
text: codelist_id Character.  codelist identifier, example "agg_KommSummer".  Find available identifiers ssb_codelists(). language Character.  Language labels.  "" (default) "en". as_tibble Logical.  TRUE (default), $values element returned list tibble.

title: Inspect the members of an SSB codelist — ssb_codelist_details
text: named list two elements: $codelist list metadata codelist: id, label, type (e.g. "Aggregation"), language, elimination (logical), elimination_value_code. $values data.frame tibble one row per group code, containing code (group code), label (group name), mapped_values (comma-separated string member codes belong group), mapped_count (many members group contains).

title: Inspect the members of an SSB codelist — ssb_codelist_details
text: codelist groups individual codes (example, municipality codes) aggregate units (example, historical municipality boundaries counties).  function lets inspect groupings directly.

title: Inspect the members of an SSB codelist — ssb_codelist_details
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Inspect the summer municipality boundary codelist cl <- ssb_codelist_details("agg_KommSummer")  # See top-level metadata cl$codelist  # View the group-to-member mapping cl$values } # }

what: List available codelists for an SSB table — ssb_codelists
title: List available codelists for an SSB table — ssb_codelists
text: Returns aggregation codelists SSB provides dimension table.  codelist lets request data different grouping level without manually remapping codes — example, using historical municipality boundary instead current municipality codes.  Use discover codelists exist passing one get_ssb_data() via codelists argument.

title: List available codelists for an SSB table — ssb_codelists
code: ssb_codelists(   table_id,   dimension = NULL,   language = "no",   cache = TRUE,   refresh_metadata = FALSE )

title: List available codelists for an SSB table — ssb_codelists
text: table_id Character.  SSB table identifier. dimension Optional character.  supplied, codelists dimension returned.  Must match dimension identifier exactly shown ssb_describe(). language Character.  Language labels.  "" (default) "en". cache Logical.  TRUE (default), table metadata stored memory session. refresh_metadata Logical.  TRUE, discard cached metadata fetch fresh information SSB.  Defaults FALSE.

title: List available codelists for an SSB table — ssb_codelists
text: data.frame one row per codelist, containing columns table_id, dimension, dimension_label, codelist_id, codelist_label, codelist_type, supports_output_values, suggested_output_values, codelist_href. codelists exist, empty data.frame structure returned.

title: List available codelists for an SSB table — ssb_codelists
text: supports_output_values column indicates whether codelist supports output_values argument get_ssb_data().  TRUE, can pass "aggregated" receive one row per group "single" receive one row per underlying member code.  suggested_output_values column shows accepted values convenience reminder.

title: List available codelists for an SSB table — ssb_codelists
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # List all codelists for table 07459 ssb_codelists("07459")  # Filter to a specific geographic dimension ssb_codelists("07459", dimension = "Region") } # }

what: List valid codes for one dimension of an SSB table — ssb_codes
title: List valid codes for one dimension of an SSB table — ssb_codes
text: Returns every code accepted filter value one dimension given table, together human-readable label code.  Use calling get_ssb_data() verify codes want filter valid.

title: List valid codes for one dimension of an SSB table — ssb_codes
code: ssb_codes(   table_id,   dimension,   language = "no",   cache = TRUE,   refresh_metadata = FALSE )

title: List valid codes for one dimension of an SSB table — ssb_codes
text: table_id Character.  SSB table identifier, example "07459". dimension Character.  dimension identifier, exactly shown dimension column ssb_describe().  example "Region" "Tid". language Character.  Language labels.  "" (default) "en". cache Logical.  TRUE (default), table metadata stored memory session repeated calls table fast. refresh_metadata Logical.  TRUE, discard cached metadata fetch fresh information SSB.  Defaults FALSE.

title: List valid codes for one dimension of an SSB table — ssb_codes
text: data.frame four columns: table_id, dimension, code (value use filter), label (human-readable name).

title: List valid codes for one dimension of an SSB table — ssb_codes
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Inspect all dimensions of table 07459 ssb_describe("07459")  # List every valid code for the Region dimension ssb_codes("07459", "Region")  # Same in English ssb_codes("07459", "Region", language = "en") } # }

what: Describe an SSB table and its dimensions — ssb_describe
title: Describe an SSB table and its dimensions — ssb_describe
text: Returns compact summary table's structure: title, last updated, row dimension showing many codes available role dimension plays.  recommended first call working new table.

title: Describe an SSB table and its dimensions — ssb_describe
code: ssb_describe(table_id, language = "no", cache = TRUE, refresh_metadata = FALSE)

title: Describe an SSB table and its dimensions — ssb_describe
text: table_id Character.  SSB table identifier, example "07459". language Character.  Language labels.  "" (default) "en". cache Logical.  TRUE (default), table metadata stored memory session repeated calls fast. refresh_metadata Logical.  TRUE, discard cached metadata fetch fresh information SSB.  Defaults FALSE.

title: Describe an SSB table and its dimensions — ssb_describe
text: named list elements $table $dimensions. See Details exact structure.

title: Describe an SSB table and its dimensions — ssb_describe
text: function returns named list two elements: $table list table_id, table_label, updated (ISO timestamp), full_table_estimated_rows (total number cells download whole table). $dimensions data.frame one row per dimension, containing dimension id, label, role, number available codes (n_codes), logical column has_units indicating whether unit metadata available. role column classifies dimension: "time" primary time dimension. "geo" geographic dimension municipality county. "contents" measure dimension (counted measured). "" classification variable.

title: Describe an SSB table and its dimensions — ssb_describe
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ desc <- ssb_describe("07459")  # Print the table-level summary desc$table  # View the dimension list — use the 'dimension' column as # the names of filter arguments in get_ssb_data() desc$dimensions  # Same table with English labels ssb_describe("07459", language = "en") } # }

what: Expand grouped codelist codes to individual member codes — ssb_expand_codelist_mapping
title: Expand grouped codelist codes to individual member codes — ssb_expand_codelist_mapping
text: Takes data frame contains grouped codelist codes (example, aggregated region codes returned using output_values = "aggregated" get_ssb_data()) expands row one row per individual member code.  makes easy join SSB aggregate data onto dataset uses underlying individual codes.

title: Expand grouped codelist codes to individual member codes — ssb_expand_codelist_mapping
code: ssb_expand_codelist_mapping(   data,   code_col,   codelist_id,   language = "no",   member_col = "member_code",   keep_unmatched = TRUE,   as_tibble = TRUE )

title: Expand grouped codelist codes to individual member codes — ssb_expand_codelist_mapping
text: data data.frame tibble contains column grouped codelist codes. code_col Character.  name column data holds grouped codes, example "Region". codelist_id Character.  codelist identifier defines grouping, example "agg_KommSummer". language Character.  Language used fetching codelist details.  "" (default) "en". member_col Character.  name new column add result contain expanded member codes.  Defaults "member_code".  Must already exist data. keep_unmatched Logical.  TRUE (default), rows whose grouped code found codelist kept result NA member_col.  FALSE, rows silently dropped. as_tibble Logical.  TRUE (default), result returned tibble.

title: Expand grouped codelist codes to individual member codes — ssb_expand_codelist_mapping
text: tibble (data.frame as_tibble = FALSE) columns data plus one new column named member_col.  number rows may larger input groups contain multiple members.

title: Expand grouped codelist codes to individual member codes — ssb_expand_codelist_mapping
text: row data may expand multiple rows grouped code maps several member codes.  original columns duplicated accordingly.  grouped code maps members keep_unmatched = TRUE, row kept NA member_col; keep_unmatched = FALSE dropped.

title: Expand grouped codelist codes to individual member codes — ssb_expand_codelist_mapping
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Download population aggregated by summer municipality boundary pop_agg <- get_ssb_data(     "07459",     Tid           = "top(1)",     codelists     = list(Region = "agg_KommSummer"),     output_values = list(Region = "aggregated") )  # Expand each group row to one row per member municipality code pop_expanded <- ssb_expand_codelist_mapping(     data        = pop_agg,     code_col    = "Region",     codelist_id = "agg_KommSummer" )  # Rows whose group code has no members are kept with NA # by default; set keep_unmatched = FALSE to drop them pop_expanded_clean <- ssb_expand_codelist_mapping(     data            = pop_agg,     code_col        = "Region",     codelist_id     = "agg_KommSummer",     keep_unmatched  = FALSE ) } # }

what: Download SSB data using a codelist without specifying the dimension — ssb_get_by_codelist
title: Download SSB data using a codelist without specifying the dimension — ssb_get_by_codelist
text: convenience wrapper around get_ssb_data() automatically looks dimension codelist belongs applies .  Use instead get_ssb_data() know codelist identifier want use want manually identify matching dimension.

title: Download SSB data using a codelist without specifying the dimension — ssb_get_by_codelist
code: ssb_get_by_codelist(   table_id,   codelist_id,   ...,   dimension = NULL,   output_value = NULL,   language = "no",   as_tibble = TRUE,   override_large_query = FALSE,   table_format = "wide",   include_singleton_dims = FALSE,   cache = TRUE,   refresh_metadata = FALSE,   max_get_query_chars = 1500L,   show_chunk_progress = FALSE )

title: Download SSB data using a codelist without specifying the dimension — ssb_get_by_codelist
text: table_id Character.  SSB table identifier, example "07459". codelist_id Character.  codelist identifier apply, example "agg_KommSummer".  Use ssb_codelists() find available identifiers table. ... Filters table dimensions, passed directly get_ssb_data().  filter named argument whose name dimension identifier whose value character vector codes server-side expression "top(3)". dimension Optional character.  needed codelist identifier used one dimension table.  Specify dimension identifier explicitly resolve ambiguity. output_value Optional character.  Controls codelist dimension appears result.  "aggregated" (default supported) returns one row per group defined codelist. "single" returns one row per underlying member code.  Leave NULL use SSB default.  applicable codelist supports output values (see supports_output_values ssb_codelists()). language Character.  Language labels.  "" (default) "en". as_tibble Logical.  TRUE (default), result returned tibble. override_large_query Logical.  TRUE, bypass cell limit guard.  See get_ssb_data() details. table_format Character.  "wide" (default) "long". See get_ssb_data() details. include_singleton_dims Logical.  used table_format = "long".  See get_ssb_data() details. cache Logical.  TRUE (default), table metadata cached memory session. refresh_metadata Logical.  TRUE, discard cached metadata re-fetch SSB.  Defaults FALSE. max_get_query_chars Numeric.  Internal tuning parameter; see get_ssb_data() details.  Defaults 1500L. show_chunk_progress Logical.  Deprecated.  effect.

title: Download SSB data using a codelist without specifying the dimension — ssb_get_by_codelist
text: tibble (data.frame as_tibble = FALSE) described get_ssb_data().

title: Download SSB data using a codelist without specifying the dimension — ssb_get_by_codelist
text: function calls ssb_codelists() internally confirm codelist identifier exists table determine dimension belongs .  calls get_ssb_data() correct codelists output_values arguments filled automatically. codelist identifier present one dimension, function stops message listing affected dimensions can pass correct one via dimension.

title: Download SSB data using a codelist without specifying the dimension — ssb_get_by_codelist
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Download population aggregated by summer municipality boundary. # The function detects that "agg_KommSummer" belongs to Region. pop <- ssb_get_by_codelist(     "07459",     "agg_KommSummer",     Tid          = "top(3)",     output_value = "aggregated" )  # Request individual member codes instead of aggregated groups pop_single <- ssb_get_by_codelist(     "07459",     "agg_KommSummer",     Tid          = "top(3)",     output_value = "single" )  # When the codelist exists on multiple dimensions, specify which one pop_explicit <- ssb_get_by_codelist(     "07459",     "agg_KommSummer",     Tid          = "top(3)",     dimension    = "Region",     output_value = "aggregated" ) } # }

what: Search SSB tables by keyword — ssb_search
title: Search SSB tables by keyword — ssb_search
text: Searches SSB Statistikkbank table catalogue returns summary matching tables.  Use starting point yet know table identifier need.

title: Search SSB tables by keyword — ssb_search
code: ssb_search(   query = NULL,   language = "no",   page = 1L,   page_size = 20L,   fetch_all = FALSE,   as_tibble = TRUE )

title: Search SSB tables by keyword — ssb_search
text: query Optional character.  keyword search .  search matches table titles.  Pass NULL (default) list available tables without filtering. language Character.  Language table titles labels. Use "" Norwegian (default) "en" English. page Integer.  page results return.  Defaults 1 (first page).  SSB paginates search results; use fetch_all = TRUE want pages . page_size Integer.  Number tables per page.  Must 1 1000.  Defaults 20. fetch_all Logical.  TRUE, pages fetched automatically combined single result.  Defaults FALSE. as_tibble Logical.  TRUE (default), result returned tibble.

title: Search SSB tables by keyword — ssb_search
text: tibble (data.frame as_tibble = FALSE) one row per matching table.

title: Search SSB tables by keyword — ssb_search
text: row result describes one table contains following columns: id table identifier pass get_ssb_data(). label full title table. description short description (may NA). updated Date time table last updated. first_period, last_period earliest latest time periods available. category Thematic category (e.g. "befolkning"). source SSB unit publishes table. variables Comma-separated dimension names, excluding measure dimension present every table. result also carries four attributes describing current page: page_number, page_size, total_elements, total_pages. fetch_all = TRUE attributes reflect last fetched page.

title: Search SSB tables by keyword — ssb_search
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Search for tables about population ssb_search("befolkning")  # List all tables in English, 50 at a time ssb_search(language = "en", page_size = 50)  # Retrieve all pages of results for a broad keyword ssb_search("arbeid", fetch_all = TRUE) } # }

what: List measurement units for an SSB table — ssb_units
title: List measurement units for an SSB table — ssb_units
text: Returns unit information ("persons", "NOK", "per cent") codes table's measure dimension.  tables expose units contents/measure dimension; geographic time dimensions typically none.

title: List measurement units for an SSB table — ssb_units
code: ssb_units(   table_id,   dimension = NULL,   language = "no",   cache = TRUE,   refresh_metadata = FALSE )

title: List measurement units for an SSB table — ssb_units
text: table_id Character.  SSB table identifier, example "07459". dimension Optional character.  dimension identifier filter results single dimension.  NULL (default), units dimensions returned. language Character.  Language labels.  "" (default) "en". cache Logical.  TRUE (default), table metadata stored memory session. refresh_metadata Logical.  TRUE, discard cached metadata fetch fresh information SSB.  Defaults FALSE.

title: List measurement units for an SSB table — ssb_units
text: data.frame columns table_id, dimension, dimension_label, code, label, unit_base (unit name, e.g. "persons"), unit_decimals (number decimal places SSB recommends display).

title: List measurement units for an SSB table — ssb_units
text: every code measure dimension unit; codes without unit metadata excluded result.  table unit metadata , empty data.frame correct column structure returned rather error.

title: List measurement units for an SSB table — ssb_units
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # List all units for table 07459 ssb_units("07459")  # Filter to the contents dimension only ssb_units("07459", dimension = "ContentsCode") } # }

title: StatistikkbankR 0.1.0
text: First build

title: StatistikkbankR 0.2.0
text: Fixed critical bugs (mistakes data assembled). Testing functions (overall coverage 83.41%), including end--end tests several tables. Boolean arguments detect convert months quarters zoo’s yearmon yearqtr classes.
